name: backup-workflow
description: Machine-readable backup workflow definition — create backup, verify integrity, manage retention, and report status.

trigger.description: Backup trigger: manual, scheduled, pre-deploy, pre-migration

databasePath.description: Path to the source database file

steps.name: Validate Source Database
steps.description: Check source database exists, is readable, and is not corrupted

steps.name: Create Backup
steps.description: Copy database file to backup location with timestamp naming

steps.name: Verify Backup Integrity
steps.description: Run PRAGMA integrity_check on the backup file to ensure it is valid

steps.name: Manage Backup Retention
steps.description: Delete old backups exceeding retention limits — daily, weekly, monthly

steps.name: Update Backup Manifest
steps.description: Record backup metadata — filename, size, timestamp, trigger, checksum

steps.name: Compute Backup Statistics
steps.description: Calculate backup stats — total backups, total size, average size, retention compliance

steps.name: Return Backup Status
steps.description: Return structured status — backup file, size, duration, verification result
